TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: TsouNr_lovestry_wang-2
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: pan to moso la yuso ci mo eh 'o'oko no hahocngʉ ho mamespingi.
S.PHON: psn to moso ɗs juso ʦi mo eh ʔoʔoko no hshoʦŋɨ ho msmespiŋi.
S.FORM: pan to moso la yuso ci mo eh 'o'oko no hahocngʉ ho mamespingi.
S.PHON: psn to moso ɗs juso ʦi mo eh ʔoʔoko no hshoʦŋɨ ho msmespiŋi.
S.TRANSL: 有兩個小孩,男孩和女孩.
There were two children, a boy and a girl.

S.FORM: eh ahoi ne moso n'a oko ho noepohʉ.
S.PHON: eh shoi ne moso nʔs oko ho noepohɨ.
S.FORM: eh ahoi ne moso n'a oko ho noepohʉ.
S.PHON: eh shoi ne moso nʔs oko ho noepohɨ.
S.TRANSL: 他們從小在一起.

TRANSL.notes: Since (they) were little kids, they got together.

S.TRANSL: Since were little kids, they got together.

S.FORM: i'o oko no mamespingi ahoi moso ahoi ne moso n'a oko ho na'no kaebʉ to bʉvnʉ.
S.PHON: iʔo oko no msmespiŋi shoi moso shoi ne moso nʔs oko ho nsʔno kseɓɨ to ɓɨvnɨ.
S.FORM: i'o oko no mamespingi ahoi moso ahoi ne moso n'a oko ho na'no kaebʉ to bʉvnʉ.
S.PHON: iʔo oko no msmespiŋi shoi moso shoi ne moso nʔs oko ho nsʔno kseɓɨ to ɓɨvnɨ.
S.TRANSL: 女孩從小就喜歡花.
The girl liked flowers very much since she was a child.

S.FORM: o osi la eainca no koyusi ho ta'u cu mameoi ta'u la mʉm'ʉ no hana ho acʉha mʉ'i 'e mo conno hosa tan'evo.
S.PHON: o osi ɗs esinʦs no kojusi ho tsʔu ʦu msmeoi tsʔu ɗs mɨmʔɨ no hsns ho sʦɨhs mɨʔi ʔe mo ʦonno hoss tsnʔevo.
S.FORM: o osi la eainca no koyusi ho ta'u cu mameoi ta'u la mʉm'ʉ no hana ho acʉha mʉ'i 'e mo conno hosa tan'evo.
S.PHON: o osi ɗs esinʦs no kojusi ho tsʔu ʦu msmeoi tsʔu ɗs mɨmʔɨ no hsns ho sʦɨhs mɨʔi ʔe mo ʦonno hoss tsnʔevo.
S.TRANSL: 她想,我長大以後,我要種花種滿整個村子.
She thought, when I grow up, I would grow flowers all over the whole village.

S.FORM: 'a mohcu la asuhcu sasmoyʉskʉ.
S.PHON: ʔs mohʦu ɗs ssuhʦu sssmojɨskɨ.
S.FORM: 'a mohcu la asuhcu sasmoyʉskʉ.
S.PHON: ʔs mohʦu ɗs ssuhʦu sssmojɨskɨ.
S.TRANSL: 他們漸漸長大了.
They gradually grew up.

S.FORM: moso la yuyuso 'e 'e hahocngʉ ho mamespingi ho yuyuso uh to fuengu ho pespak'i.
S.PHON: moso ɗs jujuso ʔe ʔe hshoʦŋɨ ho msmespiŋi ho jujuso uh to fueŋu ho pespskʔi.
S.FORM: moso la yuyuso 'e 'e hahocngʉ ho mamespingi ho yuyuso uh to fuengu ho pespak'i.
S.PHON: moso ɗs jujuso ʔe ʔe hshoʦŋɨ ho msmespiŋi ho jujuso uh to fueŋu ho pespskʔi.
S.TRANSL: 有一次男孩和女孩一起走去山上玩.
The boy and the girl once walked to the mountain together and played.

S.FORM: eh moso ehm osi osi na'na ʉmnʉa to hahocngʉ 'e mamespingi.
S.PHON: eh moso ehm osi osi nsʔns ɨmnɨs to hshoʦŋɨ ʔe msmespiŋi.
S.FORM: eh moso ehm osi osi na'na ʉmnʉa to hahocngʉ 'e mamespingi.
S.PHON: eh moso ehm osi osi nsʔns ɨmnɨs to hshoʦŋɨ ʔe msmespiŋi.
S.TRANSL: 那男孩很喜歡女孩.
The boy loved the girl very much.

S.FORM: osi te akoyu no eN mi'usnu ho eʉsvʉta ho os'o ucia vcongʉ.
S.PHON: osi te skoju no en miʔusnu ho eɨsvɨts ho osʔo uʦis vʦoŋɨ.
S.FORM: osi te akoyu no eN mi'usnu ho eʉsvʉta ho os'o ucia vcongʉ.
S.PHON: osi te skoju no en miʔusnu ho eɨsvɨts ho osʔo uʦis vʦoŋɨ.
S.TRANSL: 他打算面向那女孩,對她說"我要跟你結婚".

TRANSL.notes: He would intend to turn to (the girl) and tell (her): "I would like to marry you."

S.TRANSL: He would intend to turn to and tell : "I would like to marry you."

S.FORM: micu pasunaeno to mo conci isi na'na ʉmnʉa ci pasunaeno ho toveucu to bʉʉvnʉ ci isi na'na ʉmnʉa to eh oko no mamespingi.
S.PHON: miʦu pssunseno to mo ʦonʦi isi nsʔns ɨmnɨs ʦi pssunseno ho toveuʦu to ɓɨɨvnɨ ʦi isi nsʔns ɨmnɨs to eh oko no msmespiŋi.
S.FORM: micu pasunaeno to mo conci isi na'na ʉmnʉa ci pasunaeno ho toveucu to bʉʉvnʉ ci isi na'na ʉmnʉa to eh oko no mamespingi.
S.PHON: miʦu pssunseno to mo ʦonʦi isi nsʔns ɨmnɨs ʦi pssunseno ho toveuʦu to ɓɨɨvnɨ ʦi isi nsʔns ɨmnɨs to eh oko no msmespiŋi.

TRANSL.notes: (他)唱了一首他很喜歡的歌,摘了一朵那女孩很喜歡的花.

S.TRANSL: 唱了一首他很喜歡的歌,摘了一朵那女孩很喜歡的花.

TRANSL.notes: (He) just sings one song which he much loved, and picks a flower which the girl much loved.

S.TRANSL: just sings one song which he much loved, and picks a flower which the girl much loved.

S.FORM: hau faeni ho akoyu no eh mici eʉsvʉtʉ ho eainca te'o ucia vcongʉsu.
S.PHON: hsu fseni ho skoju no eh miʦi eɨsvɨtɨ ho esinʦs teʔo uʦis vʦoŋɨsu.
S.FORM: hau faeni ho akoyu no eh mici eʉsvʉtʉ ho eainca te'o ucia vcongʉsu.
S.PHON: hsu fseni ho skoju no eh miʦi eɨsvɨtɨ ho esinʦs teʔo uʦis vʦoŋɨsu.

TRANSL.notes: (他)給女孩花,並且打算告訴他,我要跟你結婚.

S.TRANSL: 給女孩花,並且打算告訴他,我要跟你結婚.

TRANSL.notes: (He) gave (her the flower) and intended to tell her, I would like to marry you.

S.TRANSL: gave and intended to tell her, I would like to marry you.

S.FORM: at'inghi nemio mo akameosʉ tealʉ to mo uhh eon to uhh va'hʉ ho mongsi.
S.PHON: stʔiŋhi nemio mo sksmeosɨ tesɗɨ to mo uhh eon to uhh vsʔhɨ ho moŋsi.
S.FORM: at'inghi nemio mo akameosʉ tealʉ to mo uhh eon to uhh va'hʉ ho mongsi.
S.PHON: stʔiŋhi nemio mo sksmeosɨ tesɗɨ to mo uhh eon to uhh vsʔhɨ ho moŋsi.
S.TRANSL: 但是那時候,他聽見有人在河邊哭.

TRANSL.notes: But at that time, (he) immediately heard someone crying by the river.

S.TRANSL: But at that time, immediately heard someone crying by the river.

S.FORM: isi cu ihe cu aiti 'iama mo cihi ci oko no mamespingi.
S.PHON: isi ʦu ihe ʦu siti ʔisms mo ʦihi ʦi oko no msmespiŋi.
S.FORM: isi cu ihe cu aiti 'iama mo cihi ci oko no mamespingi.
S.PHON: isi ʦu ihe ʦu siti ʔisms mo ʦihi ʦi oko no msmespiŋi.
S.TRANSL: 他就看... 他們就看到... 一個女孩.
He just... They just saw... a girl.

S.FORM: moso XXXX ihe cu tuocosi ho eainca mo mainenu.
S.PHON: moso **** ihe ʦu tuoʦosi ho esinʦs mo msinenu.
S.FORM: moso XXXX ihe cu tuocosi ho eainca mo mainenu.
S.PHON: moso **** ihe ʦu tuoʦosi ho esinʦs mo msinenu.
S.TRANSL: 他們就問她怎麼了.
They just ask her what's going on.

S.FORM: isi eainca mo'u tufku ho mo ngohcu 'o os'o tufkua.
S.PHON: isi esinʦs moʔu tufku ho mo ŋohʦu ʔo osʔo tufkus.
S.FORM: isi eainca mo'u tufku ho mo ngohcu 'o os'o tufkua.
S.PHON: isi esinʦs moʔu tufku ho mo ŋohʦu ʔo osʔo tufkus.
S.TRANSL: 她說,"我正在洗衣服,然後 我洗的衣服漂走了".
She said, 'I was washing clothes, and what is washed by me drifted away.

S.FORM: 'o i'o mo ngohcu ci yʉsʉ um te'o akoeva no yʉsʉ ho te meesi hohucma.
S.PHON: ʔo iʔo mo ŋohʦu ʦi jɨsɨ um teʔo skoevs no jɨsɨ ho te meesi hohuʦms.
S.FORM: 'o i'o mo ngohcu ci yʉsʉ um te'o akoeva no yʉsʉ ho te meesi hohucma.
S.PHON: ʔo iʔo mo ŋohʦu ʦi jɨsɨ um teʔo skoevs no jɨsɨ ho te meesi hohuʦms.
S.TRANSL: 我打算在明天的典禮穿那件漂走的衣服.
I would like to wear the dress which drifted away when we hold the ceremony tomorrow.

S.FORM: oko no y ine mio 'o oko no hahocngʉ isi to'usni ho ah eaa eaa 'o mo ngohcu ci yʉsʉ ho eoveineni to oko no mamespingi.
S.PHON: oko no j ine mio ʔo oko no hshoʦŋɨ isi toʔusni ho sh ess ess ʔo mo ŋohʦu ʦi jɨsɨ ho eoveineni to oko no msmespiŋi.
S.FORM: oko no y ine mio 'o oko no hahocngʉ isi to'usni ho ah eaa eaa 'o mo ngohcu ci yʉsʉ ho eoveineni to oko no mamespingi.
S.PHON: oko no j ine mio ʔo oko no hshoʦŋɨ isi toʔusni ho sh ess ess ʔo mo ŋohʦu ʦi jɨsɨ ho eoveineni to oko no msmespiŋi.
S.TRANSL: 那時, 男孩就幫忙拿回那漂走的衣服,而且還給女孩.
At that time, the boy just helped get the dress which drifted away, and gives it back to the girl.

S.FORM: ine mio i'o moso tufku ci oko no mamespingi cuma ic'o buhsaseolʉ to oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: ine mio iʔo moso tufku ʦi oko no msmespiŋi ʦums iʦʔo ɓuhssseoɗɨ to oko no hshoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: ine mio i'o moso tufku ci oko no mamespingi cuma ic'o buhsaseolʉ to oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: ine mio iʔo moso tufku ʦi oko no msmespiŋi ʦums iʦʔo ɓuhssseoɗɨ to oko no hshoʦŋɨ.
S.TRANSL: 那時,那個在洗衣服的女孩,怎麼就愛上了那個男孩.
At that time, the girl who was washing clothes unexpectedly fell in love with the boy.

S.FORM: ho at'inghi isi eainca to oko no hahocngʉ 'a 'e mo 'so eh la kaebʉ to bʉvnʉ 'e os'o ʉmʉna ci mamespingi o'a s'a su.
S.PHON: ho stʔiŋhi isi esinʦs to oko no hshoʦŋɨ ʔs ʔe mo ʔso eh ɗs kseɓɨ to ɓɨvnɨ ʔe osʔo ɨmɨns ʦi msmespiŋi oʔs sʔs su.
S.FORM: ho at'inghi isi eainca to oko no hahocngʉ 'a 'e mo 'so eh la kaebʉ to bʉvnʉ 'e os'o ʉmʉna ci mamespingi o'a s'a su.
S.PHON: ho stʔiŋhi isi esinʦs to oko no hshoʦŋɨ ʔs ʔe mo ʔso eh ɗs kseɓɨ to ɓɨvnɨ ʔe osʔo ɨmɨns ʦi msmespiŋi oʔs sʔs su.
S.TRANSL: 但是那男孩說,"我喜歡的人是喜歡花的那個女生,不是你".
But the boy says, 'the one who could like flowers is the girl whom was loved by me, not you.'
